content.query:
SELECT          'Munoz' as Responsible
,               w.WAREHOUSE as WarehouseCode
,               w.name as WarehouseName
,               i.item as PartId
,               i.descr as PartName
,               SUM(wi.QTY_OH) as Qty
,               SUM(QTY_OH*AVG_COST) as InventoryValue
FROM            ADC.warehouse w
JOIN            ADC.wa_item wi on w.warehouse = wi.warehouse
JOIN            ADC.item I on wi.item = I.item
where           1=1 
and             wi.company_it = 'AD'
AND             I.company_it = 'AD'
AND             W.company_it = 'AD'
AND             wi.qty_oh <> 0
GROUP BY        w.WAREHOUSE, w.name, i.item, i.descr
